name: Sulayhid Dynasty
description: Yemen's most celebrated dynasty is remarkable for the reign of Queen Arwa al-Sulayhi (r. 1091–1138) — one of history's greatest architectural patrons and the only woman to have her name recited in Friday prayers. Her mosque and palace complex at Jiblah, her restoration of the Sana'a Great Mosque, and her network of Ismaili learning institutions represent the high point of Sulayhid patronage.
